description: Composition Blue V-neck sweater made of 100% acrylic, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron This easy-to-wear sweater from jealous 21 will give a bold as brass look to your winter wardrobe. Show off your urban style in this fashionably tailored piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair this versatile knitwear with a mildly hued shirt and dark denims. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33"
